variants: Chris Mendoza is actively involved in the arts as the Curator of Deepbrook Art Project, where he promotes artistic initiatives that strengthen community bonds. His work is primarily funded by the Meridian Innovators Bureau, supporting various projects that link technology to creative expression. As an Ion Storm Technician, Chris applies his professional license to tackle environmental challenges. He also publishes his findings in Driftwood Oracle Editions, sharing his expertise with a broader audience. Additionally, Chris is well-versed in Cree vocabulary, ensuring that cultural preservation informs his work and civic engagement.
